title: Databricks Runtime 18.1 and Databricks Runtime 18.1 ML are in Beta
body:
Databricks Runtime 18.1 and Databricks Runtime 18.1 ML are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.1.0.

See [Databricks Runtime 18.1](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/18.1) and [Databricks Runtime 18.1 for Machine Learning](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/18.1ml).
